text: 180 Degree Inverted Aerobatic Turn.
270 Degree Roller. Full roll inside, half roll outside.
270 Degree Roller. Three full rolls inside.
45 Downline.
90 Degree Roller. Full roll inside. Exit inverted.
Bow Tie. Half roll on both 45 uplines. Exit inverted.
Double Humpty. Half roll on the downline, outside loop, three-quarter positive snap on the upline. Exit inverted.
Double Humpty. Quarter roll on the upline, positive snap on the downline, quarter roll on top. Exit inverted.
Down Fig N. Two rolls on the 45 upline.
Down Humpty. Two quarter rolls on the downline, full roll on the upline.
Down Humpty Bump. Three-quarter positive spin on entry. Exit inverted.
Down Loop. Outside loop, three-quarter opposite roll, one and three-quarter positive snaps at the bottom.
Down Sharks Tooth. Three-quarter roll on the downline, two quarter rolls on the upline. Exit inverted.
Down Sharks Tooth. Two turn positive spin on entry.
Fig N. Half roll on the inverted 45 downline. Exit inverted.
Fig P. Four-point roll on the upline, full roll at the top, positive snap on exit.
Goldfish. Two quarter rolls on the 45 upline.
Half Cuban. Outside loop, half roll on the downline.
Half Cuban. Three-quarter opposite roll on the 45 upline, outside loop, half roll on exit. Exit inverted.
Half Reverse Cuban. Push entry, half roll on the 45 downline, outside loop, three-quarter opposite roll on exit.
Half Reverse Cuban. One and a half negative snaps on the downline, inside loop, half roll opposite half roll on exit. Exit inverted.
Half Reverse Cuban. One and a quarter roll, opposite quarter roll on the 45 upline. Inside loop. One and three-quarter positive snaps, opposite three-quarter roll on exit.
Hammerhead. Three-quarter roll, opposite three-quarter positive snap on the upline. Half roll on the downline. Exit inverted.
Hammerhead.
Hammerhead. Half roll on the upline, three-quarter negative snap then three-quarter roll on the downline.
Hammerhead. Push entry, half roll on the upline, half roll on the downline, half roll to exit.
Hammerhead. Half roll on the upline, half roll on the downline.
Humpty Bump. Half roll on the upline, half roll on the downline.
Humpty. Half roll, opposite one and a half positive snaps on the upline. One and a quarter rolls on the downline.
Immelmann. One and three-quarter rolls, opposite three-quarter positive snap on entry. Outside loop. Full roll opposite, full roll on exit.
Immelmann. Half roll at the top.
Laydown Humpty. Full roll on the downline, half roll on the upline.
Laydown S. Half roll on entry, outside loop, three-quarter negative snap and quarter roll on the 45, inside loop, four-point roll on exit.
Loop. Outside entry, three-quarter opposite roll and quarter roll at the top.
Loop.
P Loop. Two full rolls on entry, three-quarter inside loop, quarter roll on the downline.
Q Loop. Full roll integrated at the top. Exit on a 45 downline.
Q Loop. Half roll on the upline, negative snap at the top, half roll on exit.
Advanced ALT sequence reset.
Advanced sequence reset.
Basic sequence reset.
Intermediate ALT sequence reset.
Intermediate sequence reset.
Sportsman sequence reset.
Unlimited ALT sequence reset.
Unlimited sequence reset.
Reverse Half Cuban. Half roll on the 45 upline.
Reverse Laydown Humpty. One and a half positive snaps, opposite one and a half rolls on the upline. Outside loop, half roll on the downline. Exit inverted.
Reverse Laydown Humpty. One and a half rolls on the upline, half roll on the downline. Exit inverted.
Roll.
Sharks Tooth. One and a quarter roll, opposite quarter roll on the 45 upline. Half roll on the downline.
Sharks Tooth. Three-quarter roll, three-quarter positive snap on the upline. Three-quarter roll, opposite three-quarter roll on the downline.
Spin. One and a half positive turns. Opposite one and three-quarter negative snaps. Exit upright.
Spin. One and a half positive turns. Half roll opposite, push to exit inverted.
Spin. One and three-quarter inverted turns. Quarter roll, pull to exit upright.
Split S. Half roll to enter.
Split S. Half roll to enter, positive snap on exit.
Tear Drop. Three-quarter negative snap and quarter roll on the upline, positive snap at the bottom.
Tear Drop. Quarter roll, opposite one and a quarter rolls on the upline, inside loop. Full roll, opposite negative snap on the downline. Exit inverted.
Tear Drop. Quarter roll, opposite one and a quarter rolls on the upline, inside loop. Full roll, opposite three-quarter negative snap on the downline. Exit inverted.
Vertical Down Line. Half roll.
Vertical Upline. Half roll, push to exit.
